name: Everyday Cotton T-Shirt

reviews.text: Soft fabric, correct size, and the color matches the photos.
Good basic shirt. It kept its shape after two washes.
Packaging was simple but clean. The product feels reliable for daily use.

product_description: Regular fit cotton t-shirt with breathable fabric and reinforced stitching.

name: Wireless Earbuds Pro X

reviews.text: Amazing product, very good quality, fast delivery. I recommend it to everyone.
Very good product, amazing quality, fast shipping. I recommend it to everyone.
Amazing quality, very good product, fast delivery. Definitely recommended.
The sound is average and the battery lasted less than advertised.

product_description: Premium wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and long battery life.

name: Smart Air Fryer 6L

reviews.text: Cooks fries evenly and the basket is easy to clean.
Capacity is enough for a small family. No strange smell after first use.
Works well, but the display buttons could be brighter.

product_description: Six liter digital air fryer with preset cooking modes and removable nonstick basket.

name: Luxury Leather Wallet

reviews.text: The wallet looks nice, but I have not used it long enough to judge durability.
Shipping was fast. The leather smell is strong and the box was damaged.
Acceptable for the price, although the stitching is not perfect.

product_description: Compact wallet made from genuine leather with RFID protection.

name: Waterproof Hiking Jacket

reviews.text: It got wet inside after ten minutes of rain. The hood is also too small.
Comfortable fit, but it is more like a windbreaker than a waterproof jacket.
The zipper is fine, but water passed through the shoulder seams.

product_description: Fully waterproof hiking jacket with sealed seams and storm hood for heavy rain.

name: Flagship Phone 15 Ultra Replica

reviews.text: Original phone, amazing product, very good quality, fast delivery.
Amazing original phone, very good quality, fast shipping.
The IMEI could not be verified and the camera quality is nothing like the description.
Box had no official warranty card. The charger and software looked suspicious.

product_description: Brand new flagship smartphone with official warranty, authentic serial number, and pro camera system.

name: Robot Vacuum Lite

reviews.text: Cleans dust well on hard floors and returns to the dock most of the time.
Navigation is sometimes confused around chair legs, but suction is good.
Battery is enough for my apartment. The app setup took a few tries.
It missed corners and the mop feature is very basic.

product_description: Entry level robot vacuum with smart mapping, auto dock return, and light mop support.

name: Noise Cancelling Headphones S2

reviews.text: Comfortable headphones with strong bass. Delivery was fast.
Comfortable headset, strong bass, and fast delivery.
Noise cancelling works indoors but struggles on the bus.
Good value when discounted. The case feels cheaper than expected.

product_description: Wireless over-ear headphones with hybrid noise cancellation and foldable carry case.
